calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Loren Lopin for and with Marianne Almajose (Executor).

Mr. Lopin waived his right to the $355.00 attorney fee. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy McConico.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Loren Lopin for and with Marianne Almajose. Maria Rey Almajose also present.

Mr. Lopin stated that a supplement was filed on Friday but not served on all of the Beneficiaries, that there are issues that will need to be continued and that he will serve notice. The accounting petition was continued to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration on how the new supplement will affect interpretation of the will and provide notice.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Continued To Jan-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Executor To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By Executor To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To Jun-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Scannell for Wells Fargo Bank. Loren Lopin for and with Marianne Almajose.

Counsel addressed the issue of whether failure to designate 100% of the proceeds results in invalidating designation. Ms. Scannell explained Wells Fargo's procedures when TAP plans get converted into 401K plans and stated that Wells Fargo was amenable to naming whatever Beneficiary the Court names. The Petition to Establish Estates Claim of Ownership to Property, etc. was continued to June 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Scannell to provide more information.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Loren Lopin for and with Marianne Almajose.

Mr. Lopin stated that there was nothing new substantive to add and that all Parties had received notice. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). The lost holographic will was admitted to probate.
